title: The Dust Horizon
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A former gunslinger dragged back across a dying frontier to save the family he left behind.
long_description: Elias Cole buried his revolver with his wife and walked away from the gunslinger's life twenty years ago. Now a drought-scoured ranching town is burning, his daughter's family is missing, and the man who took them is the same outlaw he once called brother. The Dust Horizon follows Cole across a West that is running out of water, out of mercy, and out of time — a journey that forces him to reckon with the violence he renounced and the debt he still owes.
